gates.name: has_code_blocks
gates.description: Response must contain at least 4 fenced code blocks (multi-file project)
gates.error_message: Expected at least 4 code fences (multi-file output), found {actual}

gates.name: has_export
gates.description: Code must export a default fetch handler (Cloudflare Workers pattern)
gates.error_message: Missing 'export default' — Workers require a default export

gates.name: no_node_require
gates.description: No Node.js require() calls — Workers use ES modules
gates.error_message: Node.js require() detected — use ES module imports

gates.name: no_node_fs
gates.description: No Node.js fs/path/process imports — not available in Workers
gates.error_message: Node.js module imported: {match} — not available in Workers runtime

gates.name: web_crypto
gates.description: Crypto operations must use crypto.subtle, not Node crypto
gates.error_message: Node crypto imported — use crypto.subtle (Web Crypto API)

gates.name: has_type_annotations
gates.description: Functions should have explicit return type annotations
gates.error_message: Only {actual} functions have explicit return types (expected at least 2)

gates.name: bot_self_reference
gates.description: Code comments must not reference being a bot or AI

params.pattern: (?i)(as an ai|i am a bot|generated by ai|auto-generated)
